title: yaqa` #3363
definition:
1) to be dislocated, be alienated
    1a) (Qal) to be dislocated, be torn away, be alienated
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to execute slowly (by exposure or impalation)
        1b2) to hang
    1c) (Hophal) to be executed
nasbUsage:
